tasks_completed: Add ResearchLayer to src/toolkit.py (social_comments + fetch_archived + research singleton)

learnings: brief-012 branch was already merged into main before this iteration started — committed directly to main

Catalog grew from 16 to 21 services; all new handlers wrap toolkit singletons (browse, email, research)
circle_faucet is the most complex handler — uses playwright via Browserbase to automate faucet.circle.com
